source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAKE2 AI

Take2 is an AI agents platform purpose-built for healthcare recruiting. Take2’s agent network automates the end-to-end recruiting process, from sourcing and screening to credential verification, scheduling, and onboarding.

We work with enterprise healthcare customers, including some of the largest health systems in the USA.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Take2 AI is hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer to design, launch, and continuously improve our AI Interviewers for customers. Our AI agents already conduct tens of thousands of structured candidate interviews each month.

This role sits at the intersection of voice/conversational agents, prompt + flow design, evaluation/scoring rubrics, and production iteration. You’ll work directly with customers to understand screening requirements, translate them into structured interviewer behavior, deploy agents into production, and improve performance based on real-world feedback and metrics.

This is a hands-on, highly analytical role for someone who enjoys turning ambiguous requirements into precise agent behavior, building rigorous evaluation approaches, and shipping improvements quickly in a startup environment.




WHAT YOU’LL DO



Customer Onboarding & Requirements (Customer-Facing)

 - Lead technical onboarding with customers to understand roles, hiring goals, must-have signals, and constraints.

 - Translate customer needs into structured interview flows, role-specific question banks, and scoring rubrics.

 - Set clear expectations on what “good” looks like (pass/fail thresholds, evaluation rationale, interviewer tone and style).

Voice Agent Conversation Design (Prompts + Flows)

 - Design, build, and refine prompts and agent logic that drive interviewer behavior, question sequencing, probing, and candidate experience.

 - Ensure interviewer conversations are consistent, role-relevant, and robust to edge cases (evasive candidates, unclear answers, noisy audio, interruptions).

 - Implement multi-step structured interview flows with state management and guardrails.

Evaluation & Scoring Systems

 - Design and maintain AI-based evaluation and scoring aligned to customer rubrics and hiring criteria.

 - Improve accuracy, consistency, and explainability of scoring at scale (including calibration across roles/customers).

 - Identify bias/fairness risks and contribute to mitigation strategies and compliant evaluation practices.

Deployment, Iteration, and Customer Feedback Loops

 - Launch new customer interviewers into production and own iteration cycles from early rollout through steady-state performance.

 - Use customer feedback + production metrics to prioritize improvements and deliver measurable outcomes.

 - Communicate changes clearly to customers and internal stakeholders.

Quality, Reliability, and Scale

 - Build and own lightweight QA/evaluation pipelines to measure conversation quality, scoring accuracy, and reliability before/after changes.

 - Monitor production performance and partner with engineering to balance quality, latency, and cost tradeoffs.

 - Contribute to standards and best practices for prompt quality, eval quality, and voice-agent reliability.




IN TERMS OF EXPERIENCE




REQUIRED:

 - 2+ years working with LLMs, NLP systems, or AI agents in production.

 - Demonstrated experience designing and deploying agent workflows (prompts + structured flows) that operate at scale.

 - Strong understanding of prompt engineering, agent control, failure modes, and conversational edge cases.

 - Experience building or contributing to evaluation/testing/QA frameworks for AI systems.

 - Comfort being customer-facing: running technical discovery, translating requirements, and driving onboarding to production.

 - Strong analytical mindset (accuracy, consistency, bias, calibration, and edge cases).


PREFERRED:

 - Familiarity with voice/conversational AI systems, especially real-time or high-volume environments.

 - Strong Python skills (APIs, data pipelines,

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAKE2:

Take2 is an AI agents platform purpose-built for healthcare recruiting. Take2’s agent network automates the end-to-end recruiting process, from sourcing and screening to credential verification, scheduling, and onboarding.

We work with enterprise healthcare customers, including some of the largest health systems in the USA.




WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Own and close complex mid-market and enterprise healthcare deals across 3-6 month sales cycles

 - Build pipeline through traditional and creative methods, developing relationships with hospital and healthcare leaders

 - Navigate multi-threaded buying groups through pilots and procurement to drive revenue

 - Shape the sales engine - refining ICP, messaging, and process as we scale
   
   


WHO YOU ARE:

 - You have a track record of closing complex B2B SaaS deals in the $100k+ ACV range with consistent quota attainment

 - You've owned full-cycle sales, including self-sourced pipeline and conference-based selling

 - You can smoothly navigate multi-stakeholder enterprise environments and procurement processes

 - You are confident working with limited process or infrastructure (and excited to help us build it out as we grow)

 - You have comprehensive Sales discipline, including accurate forecasting, rigorous CRM hygiene (HubSpot preferred), and thoughtful use of sales technology and AI to improve efficiency and execution




WHY TAKE2 AI

 - High ownership over revenue and customer relationships

 - Direct access to founders and influence on sales strategy

 - Opportunity to help define how Take2 sells as we scale

 - Mission-driven product that improves hiring outcomes for companies and candidates

 - Clear growth path into senior sales or leadership roles




LOCATION & FLEXIBILITY

We’re NYC-based and work hybrid (in-office Mon-Thu). We value in-person collaboration but also trust people to manage their time responsibly.




COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Competitive salary + meaningful equity. This is a chance to join at a stage where your work meaningfully shapes the product and your career trajectory.

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer - Fullstack
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAKE2 AI

Take2 is an AI agents platform purpose-built for healthcare recruiting. Take2’s agent network automates the end-to-end recruiting process, from sourcing and screening to credential verification, scheduling, and onboarding.

We work with enterprise healthcare customers, including some of the largest health systems in the USA.




ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a greenfield moment for Take2. As we scale from thousands to millions of candidate interactions, we’re expanding workflows, evolving our UI systems, and building new AI-powered capabilities for our customers.



We’re hiring a Product Engineer – Fullstack to help define the next generation of our platform, leading major feature initiatives, architecting scalable systems, evolving our frontend foundations, and helping set the technical standards that will carry us from thousands to millions of interactions.




WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

 - Design and ship new product workflows end-to-end (DB → API → UI)

 - Build rich, responsive interfaces used across enterprise teams

 - Help evolve and scale our design system

 - Improve performance and reliability as we scale from thousands to millions of interactions

 - Partner closely with product and design to turn ambiguous ideas into elegant shipped solutions

 - Shape engineering standards, patterns, and technical direction as an early key team member




WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

 - High ownership: You’ll influence both what we build and how we build it.

 - Product exposure: Engineers here shape roadmap decisions — not just implementation details.

 - Scale inflection point: You’ll help architect systems before and during rapid growth.

 - Career growth: As the product expands, so does your scope — technical leadership, architecture ownership, or broader product influence.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We care more about impact than pedigree — but here’s what tends to work well:




YOU LIKELY HAVE:

 - Experience building production software, ideally across the stack, from database design and API contracts through frontend implementation.

 - Strong frontend depth in React and TypeScript, including architecting complex user interfaces, managing state thoughtfully, and building systems that remain maintainable as the product grows.

 - Experience designing and consuming APIs, with an understanding of data modeling, performance tradeoffs, and how to structure services for clarity and scalability.

 - Experience building backend services (Node.js or similar) and making pragmatic architectural decisions as systems scale.

 - Experience significant product initiatives, working cross-functionally to define scope, make tradeoffs, and deliver high-quality systems in fast-moving environments.
   




YOU MIGHT ALSO HAVE:

 - Built or evolved a design system

 - Experience with real-time systems (WebSockets, streaming, voice)

 - Familiarity with LLM-powered features or AI-driven applications

 - Experience scaling distributed systems or high-throughput applications



We recognize that strong candidates may not match every qualification listed above. If this role excites you and you believe you could have impact at Take2, we encourage you to apply.




OUR TECH STACK:

TypeScript, React, Node.js, Postgres/MySQL (with evolving AI/real-time components)




WHAT WE VALUE

 - Builders who ship

 - Engineers who think like product owners

 - Clear communicators

 - Curiosity about AI-native workflows

 - A bias toward action and iteration






LOCATION & FLEXIBILITY

We’re NYC-based and work hybrid (in-office Mon-Thu). We value in-person collaboration but also trust people to manage their time responsibly.






COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Competitive salary + meaningful equity.
This is a chance to join at a stage where your work meaningfully shapes the product and your career trajectory.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAKE2 AI

Take2 is an AI agents platform purpose-built for healthcare recruiting. Take2’s agent network automates the end-to-end recruiting process, from sourcing and screening to credential verification, scheduling, and onboarding.

We work with enterprise healthcare customers, including some of the largest health systems in the USA.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Take2 AI is hiring a hands-on Senior Software Engineer to lead and scale the infrastructure powering our AI-driven products.



Our systems already support thousands of candidate interactions each month—now we’re building for millions. You’ll evolve the architecture to meet new demands, guide technical direction, and mentor engineers while delivering high-impact solutions.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in both high-scale environments and fast-moving startups, playing a key leadership role from design through production with significant ownership over technical execution and direction.




IN TERMS OF EXPERIENCE




REQUIRED:

 - 10+ years software engineering experience (with high exposure to full stack)

 - Bachelor’s in Computer Science or Computer Engineering

 - Has held titles such as Senior SWE, Staff/Principal Engineer, Software Engineering Lead, or Technical Lead

 - 2+ years at a Series D+ company

 - 2+ years at a fast-paced and high-growth early-stage startup (Series A or lower)

 - Demonstrated hands-on technical leadership—ownership of a domain, architecture decisions, delegation/mentoring

 - Experience building, operating, and scaling high-throughput, high-availability distributed systems, including observability/monitoring and reliability for mission-critical systems

 - Capable of contributing across the stack—backend, infrastructure, and web/frontend—jumping in where needed to deliver end-to-end solutions.

 - Comfortable navigating and working within infrastructure environments, including Kubernetes (EKS), ECS, EC2, and Docker—able to deploy, troubleshoot, and optimize services in production.

 - Skilled with JavaScript, Node.js, Python, React, AWS, EKS, ECS, Kubernetes, Docker, MySQL/Postgres
   


PREFERRED:

 - Built, deployed and scaled end-to-end AI applications (LLMs, speech/voice, recommendation engines, etc.) in consumer-facing products

 - Experience with LLMs, Voice, Streaming, Low Latency, or Machine Learning Pipelines




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Evolve and scale the backend architecture powering our AI-driven products

 - Lead technical execution: set architectural direction, mentor engineers, delegate effectively, and remain hands-on

 - Build and deliver end-to-end AI applications in close collaboration with product and founding teams

 - Ensure the reliability, scalability, and observability of production systems

 - Strengthen and evolve our engineering standards and technical culture as a key early leader on the team




LOCATION & FLEXIBILITY

We’re NYC-based and work hybrid (in-office Mon-Thu). We value in-person collaboration but also trust people to manage their time responsibly.




COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Competitive salary + meaningful equity. This is a chance to join at a stage where your work meaningfully shapes the product and your career trajectory.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Voice AI
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAKE2 AI

Take2 is an AI agents platform purpose-built for healthcare recruiting. Take2’s agent network automates the end-to-end recruiting process, from sourcing and screening to credential verification, scheduling, and onboarding.

We work with enterprise healthcare customers, including some of the largest health systems in the USA.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Take2 AI is hiring a Senior Software Engineer with deep Voice AI expertise and strong backend engineering skills.



Our real-time voice agent pipeline (VAD + STT → LLM → TTS) already powers thousands of candidate conversations every month—now we’re scaling to millions. You’ll tackle challenges in low latency, high reliability, and large-scale architecture, shaping how our platform evolves as we grow.



This role is hands-on, highly technical, and perfect for someone who thrives in a startup environment, playing a key role from design through production with significant ownership over technical execution and direction.




IN TERMS OF EXPERIENCE




REQUIRED:

 - 6+ years software engineering experience (backend or full stack)

 - Bachelor’s in Computer Science or Computer Engineering

 - Direct, hands-on experience integrating and optimizing STT, TTS, VAD, and LLMs for real-time voice agents

 - Scaled and optimized voice pipelines for low latency, high availability, and real-time performance

 - Designed and implemented agent orchestration, evaluation frameworks, and related tooling

 - Shipped production AI applications with real-time inference, integrating ML models into live systems

 - Built and operated distributed backend systems with monitoring and observability in place

 - Strong proficiency in Python, JavaScript, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker

 - 2+ years at an early to mid-stage startup (Series B or lower)
   


PREFERRED:

 - Experience self-hosting AI/ML models for use in voice AI pipelines, including tuning and optimizing them for performance and reliability

 - Experience owning and operating distributed systems in high-throughput, streaming, low-latency environments, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance under real-time constraints
   


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own and scale the end-to-end voice agent pipeline that already powers thousands of monthly conversations—help us grow it to millions

 - Select, integrate, and tune models for optimal latency, quality, and reliability

 - Build orchestration logic, evaluation systems, and supporting backend services

 - Ensure low latency, high availability, and scalability of voice agent infrastructure

 - Collaborate closely with product and engineering to rapidly prototype and deliver features, playing a key role in driving the vision and evolution of our platform and product with significant ownership over technical execution and direction




LOCATION & FLEXIBILITY

We’re NYC-based and work hybrid (in-office Mon-Thu). We value in-person collaboration but also trust people to manage their time responsibly.




COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Competitive salary + meaningful equity. This is a chance to join at a stage where your work meaningfully shapes the product and your career trajectory.

notes: AI-focused healthcare recruiting platform with strong engineering core
